zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Delves於1448年出生在英國爾多丁頓時，她的父親John Delves29歲，母親Ellen Betley Egerton26歲。她於1467年與John Aston在英國素瑞阿申亞德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在英國素瑞享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Delves于1448年出生在英国爾多丁頓时，她的父亲John Delves29岁，母亲Ellen Betley Egerton26岁。她于1467年与John Aston在英国素瑞阿申亞德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在英国素瑞享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Delves was born in 1448, in Doddington, Cheshire, England, her father, John Delves, was 29 and her mother, Ellen Betley Egerton, was 26. She married John Aston in 1467, in Ashtead, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1490, in Surrey, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Delves est née en 1448, à Doddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Delves, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ellen Betley Egerton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Aston en 1467, à Ashtead, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Delvesが1448年にイギリスチェシュアイアドッドイントンで生まれた時，父John Delvesは29歳，母Ellen Betley Egertonは26歳であった。1467年にイギリススリーアシュテアドでJohn Astonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にイギリススリーで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Delves(이)가 1448년 영국 체실르 도딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Delves(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Betley Egerton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1467년 영국 수리 애슈테아드에서 John Aston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 수리에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Delves родилась в 1448 г. в местности доддингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Delves было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Betley Egerton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Aston в 1467 г. в местности аштид, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности сурри, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.
